title: Meta announces new smart glasses starting at $299, as Zuckerberg keeps pushing wearables
summary: Meta executives have said they see the lightweight smart glasses as a step towards a more advanced device that includes screens in the lenses.

title: Meta is building a prediction markets app. These stocks fell in response
summary: The report said that CEO Mark Zuckerberg directed staff to develop a prediction markets platform, internally known as "Arena."

title: Can anyone join Musk in the trillionaire club? Zuckerberg has best shot, according to prediction markets
summary: The Meta CEO is seen as next to join the Tesla and SpaceX CEO. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is seen as the second-most-likely.
